testcase.name: com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest.testGetUserBookings

testcase.name: com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest.testBookingStatusUpdate
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Booking update failed at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:135) at com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest.testBookingStatusUpdate(BookingCancellationTest.java:47)
testcase.system-out: 21:05:27.585 [main] INFO com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest - Testing booking status update 21:05:27.591 [main] ERROR com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest - Failed to update booking java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.deloitte.service.BookingService.updateBooking(com.deloitte.model.Booking)" because "this.bookingService" is null at com.deloitte.test.BookingCancellationTest.testBookingStatusUpdate(BookingCancellationTest.java:42) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit.PojoTestSet.executeTestMethod(PojoTestSet.java:151) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit.PojoTestSet.executeTestMethods(PojoTestSet.java:102) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit.PojoTestSet.execute(PojoTestSet.java:83) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit.JUnit3Provider.executeTestSet(JUnit3Provider.java:121) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit.JUnit3Provider.invoke(JUnit3Provider.java:98) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.apache.maven.surefire.util.ReflectionUtils.invokeMethodWithArray(ReflectionUtils.java:189) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ProviderFactory$ProviderProxy.invoke(ProviderFactory.java:165) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ProviderFactory.invokeProvider(ProviderFactory.java:85) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.runSuitesInProcess(ForkedBooter.java:115) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.main(ForkedBooter.java:75)
